title: Unique IDs on Monday Work Docs
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am creating a library consisting of Monday work Docs, and need each Doc to have a unique ID (just like an ItemID or SubItemID). This DocID needs to have the same properties as ItemIDs. 
Thank you

posts.author: Amalie (Amalie Vennike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am creating a library consisting of Monday work Docs, and need each Doc to have a unique ID (just like an ItemID or SubItemID). This DocID needs to have the same properties as ItemIDs.

Thank you
